sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW(AOLKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey PercentageOfRevenue AverageCaseSize LargestCaseSize AOLCommentDesc PercentageOfDefense LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#AOLKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageOfRevenue# #AverageCaseSize# #LargestCaseSize# #AOLCommentDesc# #PercentageOfDefense# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageOfRevenue, AverageCaseSize, LargestCaseSize, AOLCommentDesc, PercentageOfDefense, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, AOLKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW set
PercentageOfRevenue = #PercentageOfRevenue# PercentageOfRevenue = null AverageCaseSize = #AverageCaseSize# AverageCaseSize = null LargestCaseSize = #LargestCaseSize# LargestCaseSize = null AOLCommentDesc = #AOLCommentDesc# AOLCommentDesc = null PercentageOfDefense = #PercentageOfDefense# PercentageOfDefense = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageOfRevenue, AverageCaseSize, LargestCaseSize, AOLCommentDesc, PercentageOfDefense, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, AOLKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AOLKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, PercentageOfRevenue, AverageCaseSize, LargestCaseSize, AOLCommentDesc, PercentageOfDefense, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AreaOfLitigationForFirmLW where AOLKey = #AOLKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
